zh.lifeSummary: 當Zoeth Howland於1636年出生在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯度波利時，他的父親Henry Howland II of Fenstanton.34歲，母親Mary Unknown27歲。他於1656年10月10日與Abigail Howland在美國羅得島紐波特紐波特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1676年1月21日在美國羅得島紐波特迪維頓享年40歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波波卡瑟特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Zoeth Howland于1636年出生在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯度波利时，他的父亲Henry Howland II of Fenstanton.34岁，母亲Mary Unknown27岁。他于1656年10月10日与Abigail Howland在美国罗德岛州紐波特紐波特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1676年1月21日在美国罗德岛州紐波特迪維頓享年40岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波波卡瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: Howland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Zoeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from an old personal name formed with Old High German got ‘god’ or guot ‘good’. Compare Gott .

variants.name: Kate
meanings: Short form of Katherine (or any of its variant spellings), reflecting the French pronunciation with -t- for -th-, which was also usual in medieval England. This short form has been continuously popular since the Middle Ages, and is now frequently used as an independent given name. It was used by Shakespeare for two important characters: the daughter of the King of France who is wooed and won by King Henry V , and the ‘shrew’ in The Taming of the Shrew.

variants.name: Koth
meanings: Short form of   Katherine   and its variants and of   Kathleen .

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: First Baptist Church
historicEvents.description: Roger Williams establishes the First Baptist Church of Rhode Island in Providence during 1638.

en.lifeSummary: When Zoeth Howland was born in 1636, in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States, his father, Henry Howland II of Fenstanton., was 34 and his mother, Mary Unknown, was 27. He married Abigail Howland on 10 October 1656, in Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 January 1676, in Tiverton, Newport, Rhode Island, United States, at the age of 40, and was buried in Pocasset, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Zoeth Howland est né en 1636, à Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, Henry Howland II of Fenstanton., avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mary Unknown, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Abigail Howland le 10 octobre 1656, à Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 janvier 1676, à Tiverton, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Pocasset, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Zoeth Howland 1636 in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Howland II of Fenstanton. 34 und seine Mutter Mary Unknown 27. Er hat am 10. Oktober 1656 in Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten Abigail Howland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Januar 1676 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Tiverton, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Pocasset, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Zoeth Howland è nato il nel 1636 nel Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Henry Howland II of Fenstanton., aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mary Unknown, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Abigail Howland il 10 ottobre 1656, nel Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 gennaio 1676, nel Tiverton, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Pocasset, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Zoeth Howlandが1636年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスダクスブリーで生まれた時，父Henry Howland II of Fenstanton.は34歳，母Mary Unknownは27歳であった。1656年10月10日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトニュープオルトでAbigail Howlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1676年1月21日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトティバートンで40歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルポカセトにて埋葬された。

ko.Pocasset, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 포캐세트
ko.Freetown, Bristol, Massachusetts: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이
ko.Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 드스버이
ko.Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이
ko.lifeSummary: Zoeth Howland(이)가 1636년 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 드스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Howland II of Fenstanton.(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Unknown(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1656년 10월 10일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 뉴포트에서 Abigail Howland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1676년 1월 21일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 티버턴에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 포캐세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Zoeth Howland nasceu em 1636, em Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Henry Howland II of Fenstanton., tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mary Unknown, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Abigail Howland em 10 de outubro de 1656, em Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1676, em Tiverton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Pocasset, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Zoeth Howland родился в 1636 г. в местности дуксбури, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Henry Howland II of Fenstanton. было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Unknown, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Abigail Howland 10 октября 1656 г. в местности нюпорт, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 января 1676 г. в местности тивиртон, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности покассет, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Zoeth Howland nació en 1636, en Duxbury, Plymouth, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, Henry Howland II of Fenstanton., tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mary Unknown, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Abigail Howland el 10 de octubre de 1656, en Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de enero de 1676, en Tiverton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Pocasset, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
